calendar.description: Senate Government Operations and Political Subdivisions Hearing

general_provisions: This bill modifies provisions relating to county governance.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>modifies definitions;<hr><ltbullet>requires certain unincorporated islands in a county of the second class to automatically annex into a bordering municipality;<hr><ltbullet>requires a county of the second class to provide notice of an automatic annexation; <hr><ltbullet>permits certain local legislative bodies to exempt unincorporated islands from automatic annexation;<hr><ltbullet>permits a final local entity plat for an annexation to depict non-contiguous areas; <hr><ltbullet>modifies the authority of a county operating under the council-manager form of government to delegate accounting services; and<hr><ltbullet>makes technical and conforming changes.

agendas.committeeName: Senate Government Operations and Political Subdivisions Committee
